tspan.tspan: Smartphone video–based estimates of knee extension moment during chair rise
relate to MRI measures of muscle function
, Feliks Kogan, Jennifer L. Hicks, Garry E. Gold, Scott L. Delp, Scott D. Uhlrich*,
e correlated OpenCap kinetics and kinematics during chair rise,
MRI-based measures of quadriceps volume and radial di
(related to fiber size and muscle quality).
